RHISEA 0.1.0

Contributing to RHISEA

Source: CONTRIBUTING.md

RHISEA: An R package for flexible and reproducible mixed-stock analysis in fisheries and ecology

Authors: Sosthene A. V. Akia¹* and Alex Hanke²

¹ Fisheries and Oceans Canada (DFO), Gulf Fisheries Centre, 343 Université Ave, Moncton, NB E1C 5K4, Canada
Email: sosthene.akia@dfo-mpo.gc.ca | +1 (506) 467 4176

² Fisheries and Oceans Canada, St. Andrews Biological Station, 531 Brandy Cove Road, St. Andrews, NB E5B 2L9, Canada

Repository

https://github.com/SostheneA/RHISEA

How to Contribute

Report Bugs

  • Open a new issue
  • Include: R / RHISEA version, reproducible code, baseline / mixture data, full error message

Development Standards

  • Requires R (>= 3.5.0)

Installation

devtools::install_github("SostheneA/RHISEA")

Acknowledgments

  • DFO Large Pelagic team: Dheeraj Busawon, Kyle Gillespie, Taryn Minch
  • ICCAT mixed-stock researchers
  • Kohma Arai (Tutorial 5, 20-stock estimation)

License

GPL-3

Contact: Sosthene Akia or GitHub Issues

On this page

Developed by Sosthene A. V. Akia, Alex Hanke.
